title: Prismatic Military Type Lensatic Compass
shortDescription: Military-style liquid prismatic lensatic compass for accurate outdoor navigation and direction finding.
description: The Prismatic Military Type Lensatic Compass is a durable and reliable navigation tool designed for trekking, camping, hiking, survival training, and outdoor adventures. Built with a military-style lensatic design, it provides accurate directional readings with a liquid-filled mechanism for stable needle movement. Its rugged construction and portable design make it suitable for both beginners and professionals in outdoor navigation.
benefits: Liquid-filled for smooth and stable readings
Suitable for hiking, trekking, camping, and outdoor survival
